response.justification: Candidate has strong hands-on senior engineering experience across multiple stacks, open-source contributions, and Linux familiarity, plus founder experience with GISCollective showing some leadership initiative. However, the role requires executive-level leadership of a team and German at C1, while the resume shows only basic German and no formal team-lead or head-of-development experience. UML/architecture modeling and explicit IT security/compliance background are also not evidenced.
strengths: Deep, broad senior engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Strong open-source orientation and Linux/Unix familiarity, plus founder of GISCollective
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery
concerns: German listed as Basic, well below the required C1 proficiency
No formal team-lead, head-of-development, or P&L-level leadership role on the resume
Limited explicit evidence of UML modeling, formal architecture artifacts, and IT security/compliance work

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership track record
